title: LegacyAppVersion
content:
# LegacyAppVersion


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when this App version was first uploaded to the App Registry, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **id** (`string`): Unique identifier for this version of the App in the App Registry.
- **payload** (`object`): Dictionary with keys for app inputs/outputs, info, spec version and system packages. Each key represents specific settings and parameters for the App.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any App keys for this App version in the App Registry were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **version** (`string`): Version number of this App in the App Registry.
summary: Object with properties: created, id, payload, updated, version

created.description: UTC time when this App version was first uploaded to the App Registry, formatted in RFC 3339.

id.description: Unique identifier for this version of the App in the App Registry.

payload.description: Dictionary with keys for app inputs/outputs, info, spec version and system packages. Each key represents specific settings and parameters for the App.

updated.description: UTC time when any App keys for this App version in the App Registry were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

version.description: Version number of this App in the App Registry.
